headline: RTX (RTX)’s The Javelin Joint Venture Makes its First LWCLU Delivery
summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) is one of the 10 Best Stocks in Steve Cohen’s Portfolio. On May 26, 2026, The Javelin Joint Venture, a partnership between Raytheon, a subsidiary of RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX), and Lockheed Martin (LMT), delivered its first Lightweight Command Launch Units (LWCLU) to the U.S. Army.
